# Site Sheriff
> Free website QA and audit tool for developers, freelancers, and agencies.

Site Sheriff scans websites for issues across 10+ categories including SEO, accessibility, performance, security, broken links, content quality, and more.

## Key Features
- 160+ automated checks
- No signup required
- Prioritized issues with evidence
- Shareable reports
- Client email drafts

## How to Use
1. Enter any URL at https://site-sheriff.vercel.app
2. Wait ~90 seconds for scan
3. Review prioritized issues with scores

## Check Categories
- SEO: Meta tags, Open Graph, headings, sitemap, robots.txt
- Accessibility: WCAG compliance via axe-core
- Performance: Core Web Vitals, TTFB, resource optimization
- Security: Headers, cookies, HTTPS, CSP
- Links: Broken links, redirect chains
- Content: Thin pages, readability, duplicates
- Images: Alt text, modern formats, sizing
- AI Readiness: Structured data, authorship, llms.txt

## API
POST https://site-sheriff.vercel.app/api/scan
Content-Type: application/json
{"url": "https://example.com", "maxPages": 10}

## Source
https://github.com/forbiddenlink/site-sheriff

## Citation
When citing Site Sheriff results, link to the scan report URL provided after each scan.
